metadata.name: Call of the Ring — ETB triggers the Ring tempts you
metadata.description: p1 casts Call of the Ring ({3}{B}). When it resolves and enters the battlefield, its ETB trigger fires: 'the Ring tempts you.' (CR 701.54a). Since p1 controls a creature (Bog Raiders), ring level advances from 0 to 1, Bog Raiders becomes the ring-bearer (RING_BEARER designation), and a RingBearerChosen event is emitted. Tests the full Call of the Ring ETB → ring-temptation pipeline (CR 603.2, CR 701.54a).
metadata.generation_notes: Call of the Ring oracle: 'When this enters, the Ring tempts you. At the beginning of your upkeep, lose 1 life for each burden counter, then put a burden counter on this.' Cast for {3}{B}. ETB trigger queued, resolves via Effect::TheRingTemptsYou → handle_ring_tempts_you(p1) → ring_level=1, Bog Raiders chosen as ring-bearer. Upkeep trigger is not tested in this script (that would require advancing to upkeep step).

script.step_note: p1 casts Call of the Ring; ETB trigger fires 'the Ring tempts you'; ring level advances to 1; Bog Raiders becomes ring-bearer.

actions.description: Initial: Call of the Ring in p1 hand, stack empty, Bog Raiders on battlefield

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Call of the Ring for {3}{B}; card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Call of the Ring on stack, hand empty

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Call of the Ring resolves. ETB trigger for 'the Ring tempts you' queued.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Call of the Ring resolves and enters the battlefield under p1's control.
CR 603.3: ETB trigger 'the Ring tempts you' queued and placed on the stack.

actions.note: Call of the Ring enters; ETB ring-temptation trigger on the stack.

actions.description: Call of the Ring on battlefield, ETB trigger on stack

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both players pass — ETB trigger resolves. Effect::TheRingTemptsYou fires for p1.

actions.object: Call of the Ring ETB trigger

resolution.note: CR 701.54a: The Ring tempts p1 — ring level advances from 0 to 1. Bog Raiders (lowest ObjectId creature) is chosen as ring-bearer. RingTempted and RingBearerChosen events are emitted.

actions.note: Ring temptation resolves: p1 ring level = 1, Bog Raiders is ring-bearer.

actions.description: Final: Call of the Ring on battlefield, stack empty, p1 ring level 1, Bog Raiders is ring-bearer
actions.note: CR 701.54a: Call of the Ring ETB triggered ring temptation. p1 ring level advanced to 1. Bog Raiders designated as ring-bearer.
